name: 桑杜莱拉·阿桑达
awards: 2026年 第76届柏林国际电影节 泰迪熊奖 最佳电影 (提名) 燃烧的黑色青春
2026年 第76届柏林国际电影节 新生代少年单元 水晶熊最佳长片 (提名) 燃烧的黑色青春
2023年 第73届柏林国际电影节 新生代少年单元 国际评审团最佳短片 (提名) 魔镜魔镜
name_full: 桑杜莱拉·阿桑达 Sandulela Asanda
introduction: The filmmaker is a graduate of the AFDA Film School in Cape Town. Her student film Nongqawuse was selected as the South African entry for the 2019 BRICS Film Festival. She is an alumna of the Locarno Film Festival’s BaseCamp, the Durban FilmMart and the Realness African Screenwriters’ Residency. She is currently writing her debut feature, Black Burns Fast, a coming-of-age story about a Black teenage girl’s journey of self-discovery while she is attending an elite, predominantly white high school.
